data.reasoningText:
This project uses the old `packages.config` format with a legacy-style `.csproj`. To convert to CPM, I need to:

1. First convert from `packages.config` to `PackageReference` format in the `.csproj`
2. Then set up CPM with a `Directory.Packages.props` file

Let me check if there's a `Directory.Packages.props` already at any level.

The project uses:
- `packages.config` with `Newtonsoft.Json` version `13.0.3`
- Old-style `.csproj` with `<Reference>` and `<HintPath>`


- The `convert-to-cpm` skill won't work here since it requires `PackageReference` already, so I need to manually convert the legacy project to SDK-style format first, remove the `packages.config` file, and then create the centralized `Directory.Packages.props`.

I'm converting the `.csproj` to use the modern SDK format with `PackageReference` instead of the old packages.config approach, then setting up the centralized package management configuration.

<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.8</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="Newtonsoft.Json, Version=13.0.0.0">
      <HintPath>..\packages\Newtonsoft.Json.13.0.3\lib\net45\Newtonsoft.Json.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>", "new_str": "<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net48</TargetFramework>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>"}

data.content:
Done. Here's what I changed:

1. **Converted `LegacyApp.csproj`** from legacy format (`packages.config` + `<Reference>` with `<HintPath>`) to SDK-style with `<PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" />` (no version — managed centrally).
2. **Created `Directory.Packages.props`** at `simple-packages-config/` with `ManagePackageVersionsCentrally` enabled and `Newtonsoft.Json` pinned to `13.0.3`.
3. **Deleted `packages.config`** — no longer needed.
